TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Fan-ti-kan, title = Fan-ti-kan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fan-ti-kan} }

S.FORM: == Fan-ti-kan śĘĶŤíāŚ≤° == Lui'tś≠∑ŚŹ≤ "Fan-ti-kan" a cudad namaka La-tin-gu "Vaticinia" miedaw a kitidaan". yu sumamad nu si-yen sip se-ci, Luo-ma-hunti cue-se-tan-din itida i Luo-ma-cen nutipan amisa nu kadu u disi ni Ye-su ci Sen-puo-duo-lu kapatayan patideng tu cue-se-tan-din kakiningan a tabakiay nu kiwkay, katukuh i caylim atu caynem a secian, cue-se-tan-din sumadeng tunu aydaay a Sen-puo-duo-lu luma', mala tensu kiwkay nu kapilihayan a kitidaan, kun-yen piclimnem mihcaan, Fa-lan-ke' wan-kuo kuowan ci Pi-pin u Luo-ma cen atu liwliw sipabeli tu ukiwsama " i kiwkay sapangangan han ci " pi-pin-sen-se", sisa mapatiden tu cen-ciw-he-y a " ukiwsama a kanatal" ahebal ku nikatukuh i Yi-ta-li subal nu tebanay a niyaduan a kitidaan. " Vaticinia,śĄŹÁāļ" . caysiw a seci, mapalekal ku O-cuo a min-cu-cu-yi, Yi-ta-li a binacadan malecad ku balucu sisa alaw adidi' adidi' ku lala' nu Yi-ta-li, amisa nu subal a Sa-tin-ni-ya wankuo mala Yi-ta-li mililiday nu kapulungan, u nuhenitu ku patidengay tu Yi-ta-li wangkuo. 19šłĖÁīÄ, . mala sakakaay nu ukiwsama a Luo-ma-cen misuayaw tu sakakalah nu sakapulung, u sakatusa a hunti ci Fa-lan-si ci Na-puo-lun san-se mala " midiputay tu kiwkay a tademaw" a ngangan sapatahekal tu hitay mamidiput tu Luo-ma-cen. . caywalpicsep mahcaan mabakuhac ku nikalepacaw, ci Na-puo-lun papatalumaen nida ku Luo-ma a hitay i kanatal, sisa u hitay nu Yi-ta-li taneng micumud i Luo-ma, malutatengaay tu a malecacay ku balucu nu Yi-ta-li, u ukiwsama patayda hantu i Luo-ma-cen nutipan amisa a kalimucu' a Fan-ti-kan nu hungtian a lumaan, u daydaytu nu ukiwsama pangangasa u " mapululay a Fan-ti-kan", siada tu Yi-ta-ll, caay papilabu tu Yi-ta-li a kakulian nu kanatal. 1870 . mangalay mikaykic tu Yi-ta-li atu aenengan nu kiwkay a cen-ce a kawawan, u sakakaay nu Yi-ta-li ci Muo-suo-li-ni atu ukiwsama midiput tu sabaw cacay a se itida i caysiwtusiw mihcaan lu bulad caycay demiad masasulit tu kiyaku " la-te'-lan kakiyakuan", palutatengan ku Yi-ta-li tada u aenengan kuyda sa, kakitidaan itida i Fan-ti-kan macimacian, singangan sa u Fan-ti-kan macimacian a kanatal, u paysupitay a kanatal, u lala' nu kanatal a caay debungan, ina kiyaku malutatengaay tu makaykic ku kiwkay atu sihu nu Yi-ta-li nu hatidaay tu a nikasasuadaay. sakatusa a nikalepacawan henay, u Fan-ti-kan miduduc tu kiyaku " la-te'-lan kakiyakuan" a sikawaw, tawyaay a ukiwsama cu Pi-hu-se-e'-se'. aenengan nu kiwkay itini i kanatal tu sakay cabayan nu saka singanganan, u ukiwsama atu kumung nu sapisuayaw tu kanatal nu cuwacuwaay a Luo-ma-kun-ciw-huy sapihaputu sasapatuduan a tatengaay a nganganan. sakay kanatalan nu Luo-ma-kun-ciw-huy a " tatelungan", kiwkay idaw ku sapikuwanaw tu kanatal a lahecian, taneng miliduma a kanatal masasulit tu kanatalan a kiyakuan atu taneng milabu tu kanatal nu masakaputay. ukiwsama pabeli tu kawaw i kiwsama nu wi-yen-huy sikawaw mikuwan tu Fan-ti-kan a kawawan, hulic nu Fa-ti-kan sipakayda i nu kiwkayan a hulican atu Fa-ti-kan-cen-kuo-cen-pen nu hucuna a hulican, anu acaay tu kasiwantanan nu Tin-cu-caw hulic sa, aw u Luo-ma-se tu a hulic ku cukaymasen. . kiwkay taneng sipakayda i nuudip tu a kiliyan pasayda i duma a kanatalan patahekal tu way-ciw-se-cei "patinaku u kun-se, ta-se sa", taneng miala tu duma a kanatalan nu nipatahekalan a way-ciw-se-cei. nika tada adidi' tu kina kanatal, duma a kanatalan patayda i Fan-ti-kan a masasakamu kanca pataydaen namin Luo-ma-se nipatidengan tu kakitidaan u Ta-se-kun. mahiniay a nika silahecian sa, Yi-ta-li aenengan nu kiwkay itida namin i Yi-ta-li nu udip tu a kanatalan. . sakaudipÁ∂ďśŅü inai' ku kakulian atu kaliwmahan, inai' ku hida sananay nu katahekalan. u sakaylaculan tu sakaudip u miliwkuay, sapaduhepi i tigamiay a paya, pa'suyay tu luma', picidekan nu daysang a kakalisiwan nu gingku a wawa nu kalisiw, Fan-tin-kan gingkiu nika silaculan atu nipasinubu nu ukiwsama atu sinza nu kiwkay a nipakinkin. . Fan-ti-kan itida i Pei-mie, O-cuo katuuday a kanatal idaw ku lasubu yi nu amilika a kalisiw sapikabu, u zaysan katukuh i Yi-ta-li nu yadahay a sakaudip nu kakulian, picidekan u sapitaykuan atu zaysang, u lala' a cacay makaala tu sipnem wang a kubuan. Kim, sakay hekal nu nisupedan makaala tu cacay a lasubu nu yi a kalisiwan nu Amilika. nu ayawan itida i tusepseptu mihcaan, Fan-ti-kan u Yi-ta-li-li-la atu Fan-ti-kan-li-la u sakalecad nu kalisiwan. Yi-ta-li milab utu O yun sa, masasulit ku Fan-ti-kan atu O-mun, patahekal misangan tu kalibuwa nu Fan-ti-kan, sasasingaan atu sakalalisiwan nu cacukaymasan. Śú®2002ŚĻīšĽ•ŚČć, . caysiwpicsep mihcaan nu teban a demiadan, Fan-ti-kan kabalihenawan nu sakaudip tada misuayaw tu nika ngelu' nu tada misuayaw tu nika ngelu' nu gingkuan, picidekan patelac ku nipikabuan atu macunusa nu lipida nu mikuliay, sisa akazi; tu. caysiwsiwsip mihcaan mikisang satu ku gingku idaw ku liwan tu sipcay.lu wang a Amilika nu kalisiw, idaw ku lalaculan tu 1.7428 yi Amilika a kalisiw, sapatahekal 1.7387 yi Amilika a kalisiw, tusepcaysep mihcaan Fan-ti-kan na akazi sa kapahtu ku sakasilaculan, na laculan han tu yi sip malebut lim lasubu wang O-yen, sapatahekal tu yi lu malebut lim lasubu wang Oyen. 1970 . lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ Fan-ti-kan cen u lalangawan tu kiya kakitidaan, u sangan tu luma' patinaku u Sen-puo-tun-lu luma', Si-se-ten pilipayan a kiwkay u sakay kanatalan u sakaetiman nu sanga a luma'an, pasu Puo-tu-cie-li, Pei-e-ni-ni, La-pei-e atu Mi-kay-lan-ci-luo nu tademawan a sanga. Fan-ti-kan idaw ku sasingaan tu cudad a tu-su-kun, atu puo-u-kun, u sapisingaaw tu idaw nu lui't, ke-sye atu kasipucay a nalimaan. . demidemiad nu Fan-ti-kan a nikaudip u misizaay ku yadah, katukuhan tu pilipayan, tinsukiw a sinza ida nami masaupu i Sen-puo-tu-lu putah, teban nu caytu a kalahukan, kakatengil tu suni nu kiwkay, ukiwsama itida i tungduh nu Sen-puo-tu-lu kiwkay teban nu sasingalan a tahekal, pasayda i sinza a mihapu tu sasakamuen, Fan-ti-kan a Zuy-se-wi-duy tu mihmihcaan a lima a bulad enem a demiad itida i Sen-ta-ma-suo putah mipalima, miasip tu lima nu seci nu caayan kasumad a sasakamuen, miinuli tu paudipay tu udip mihedek tu sakakapah nu kawaan, mikilul tu ukiwsama pabeli tu nika udipan tu sakaudip. . tademaw atu kamušļļŚŹ£ŚíĆŤ™ěŤ®Ä ilabuay nu tademaw i Fan-ti-kan a niyaduan makaala tu wallusep a tademaw, u sunghu namin, pasu ukiwsama, sunghu, siwni, atu kasinganganan a zuy-se-cin-wi-duy. . caay henay mihapu ku Fan-ti-kan tu tadakamu, nika itida i Luo-ma kiwkay u tada tatengaay a sulitan u latingu. itida i kanatal han, yu lipuing atu kunmuing u Yi-ta-li namin ku kamu nu heni. yu mamasakamu ku tademaw, aadihan tu cudad atu laziw, u Yi-ta-li atu nu duma a sasakamuen. u Zuy-se cin-wi-duy, u De-yi ku kamu nu heni. .
S.PHON: == fan-ti-kan *** == r~…ĺui Ē~ °t** "fan-ti-kan" a ¶udad namaka r~…ĺa-tin-gu "*ati ¶inia" mi…ôdaw a kitidaan". ju sumamad nu si-j…ôn sip s…ô- ¶i, r~…ĺuo-ma-ńßunti ¶u…ô-s…ô-tan-din itida i r~…ĺuo-ma- ¶…ôn nutipan amisa nu kadu u disi ni j…ô-su ¶i s…ôn-puo-duo-r~…ĺu kapatajan patid…ôŇč tu ¶u…ô-s…ô-tan-din kakiniŇčan a tabakiaj nu kiwkaj, katukuńß i ¶ajr~…ĺim atu ¶ajn…ôm a s…ô ¶ian, ¶u…ô-s…ô-tan-din sumad…ôŇč tunu ajdaaj a s…ôn-puo-duo-r~…ĺu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa t…ônsu kiwkaj nu kapir~…ĺińßajan a kitidaan, kun-j…ôn pi ¶r~…ĺimn…ôm mińß ¶aan, fa-r~…ĺan-k…ô Ē~ ° wan-kuo kuowan ¶i pi-pin u r~…ĺuo-ma ¶…ôn atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw sipab…ôr~…ĺi tu ukiwsama " i kiwkaj sapaŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i " pi-pin-s…ôn-s…ô", sisa mapatid…ôn tu ¶…ôn- ¶iw-ńß…ô-j a " ukiwsama a kanatar~…ĺ" ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku nikatukuńß i ji-ta-r~…ĺi subar~…ĺ nu t…ôbanaj a nijaduan a kitidaan. " *ati ¶inia,**" . ¶ajsiw a s…ô ¶i, mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku o- ¶uo a min- ¶u- ¶u-ji, ji-ta-r~…ĺi a bina ¶adan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku bar~…ĺu ¶u sisa ar~…ĺaw adidi Ē~ ° adidi Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu ji-ta-r~…ĺi, amisa nu subar~…ĺ a sa-tin-ni-ja wankuo mar~…ĺa ji-ta-r~…ĺi mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan, u nuńß…ônitu ku patid…ôŇčaj tu ji-ta-r~…ĺi waŇčkuo. ****, . mar~…ĺa sakakaaj nu ukiwsama a r~…ĺuo-ma- ¶…ôn misuajaw tu sakakar~…ĺańß nu sakapur~…ĺuŇč, u sakatusa a ńßunti ¶i fa-r~…ĺan-si ¶i na-puo-r~…ĺun san-s…ô mar~…ĺa " midiputaj tu kiwkaj a tad…ômaw" a ŇčaŇčan sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ńßitaj mamidiput tu r~…ĺuo-ma- ¶…ôn. . ¶ajwar~…ĺpi ¶s…ôp mańß ¶aan mabakuńßa ¶ ku nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, ¶i na-puo-r~…ĺun papatar~…ĺuma…ôn nida ku r~…ĺuo-ma a ńßitaj i kanatar~…ĺ, sisa u ńßitaj nu ji-ta-r~…ĺi tan…ôŇč mi ¶umud i r~…ĺuo-ma, mar~…ĺutat…ôŇčaaj tu a mar~…ĺ…ô ¶a ¶aj ku bar~…ĺu ¶u nu ji-ta-r~…ĺi, u ukiwsama patajda ńßantu i r~…ĺuo-ma- ¶…ôn nutipan amisa a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° a fan-ti-kan nu mikajki ¶ tu ji-ta-r~…ĺi atu a…ôn…ôŇčan nu kiwkaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a kawawan, u sakakaaj nu ji-ta-r~…ĺi ¶i muo-suo-r~…ĺi-ni atu ukiwsama midiput tu sabaw ¶a ¶aj a s…ô itida i ¶ajsiwtusiw mińß ¶aan r~…ĺu a…ôn…ôŇčan nu kiwkaj itini i kanatar~…ĺ tu sakaj ¶abajan nu saka siŇčaŇčanan, u ukiwsama atu kumuŇč nu sapisuajaw tu kanatar~…ĺ nu ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a r~…ĺuo-ma-kun- ¶iw-ńßuj sapińßaputu sasapatuduan a ¶id…ôkan nu dajsaŇč a kakar~…ĺisiwan nu giŇčku a wawa nu kar~…ĺisiw, fan-tin-kan giŇčkiu nika sir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu nipasinubu nu ukiwsama atu sinza nu kiwkaj a nipakinkin. . fan-ti-kan itida i p…ôi-mi…ô, o- ¶uo katuudaj a kanatar~…ĺ idaw ku r~…ĺasubu ji nu amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw sapikabu, u zajsan katukuńß i ji-ta-r~…ĺi nu jadańßaj a sakaudip nu kakur~…ĺian, pi ¶id…ôkan u sapitajkuan atu zajsaŇč, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a ¶a ¶aj makaar~…ĺa tu sipn…ôm waŇč a kubuan. kim, sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu nisup…ôdan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu nu ji a kar~…ĺisiwan nu amir~…ĺika. nu ajawan itida i tus…ôps…ôptu mińß ¶aan, fan-ti-kan u ji-ta-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺa atu fan-ti-kan-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺa u sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kar~…ĺisiwan. ji-ta-r~…ĺi mir~…ĺab utu o jun sa, masasur~…ĺit ku fan-ti-kan atu o-mun, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ misaŇčan tu kar~…ĺibuwa nu fan-ti-kan, sasasiŇčaan atu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺisiwan nu ¶a ¶ukajmasan. ********, . ¶ajsiwpi ¶s…ôp mińß ¶aan nu t…ôban a d…ômiadan, fan-ti-kan kabar~…ĺińß…ônawan nu sakaudip tada misuajaw tu nika Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° nu tada misuajaw tu nika Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° nu giŇčkuan, pi ¶id…ôkan pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku nipikabuan atu ma ¶unusa nu r~…ĺipida nu mikur~…ĺiaj, sisa akazi; tu. ¶ajsiwsiwsip mińß ¶aan mikisaŇč satu ku giŇčku idaw ku r~…ĺiwan tu sip ¶aj.r~…ĺu waŇč a amir~…ĺika nu kar~…ĺisiw, idaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu *.**** ji amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw, sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ji r~…ĺu mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺim r~…ĺasubu waŇč oj…ôn. **** . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ** fan-ti-kan ¶…ôn u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tu kija kakitidaan, u saŇčan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° patinaku u s…ôn-puo-tun-r~…ĺu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, si-s…ô-t…ôn pir~…ĺipajan a kiwkaj u sakaj kanatar~…ĺan u saka…ôtiman nu saŇča a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, pasu puo-tu- ¶i…ô-r~…ĺi, p…ôi-…ô-ni-ni, r~…ĺa-p…ôi-…ô atu mi-kaj-r~…ĺan- ¶i-r~…ĺuo nu tad…ômawan a saŇča. fan-ti-kan idaw ku sasiŇčaan tu ¶udad a tu-su-kun, atu puo-u-kun, u sapisiŇčaaw tu idaw nu r~…ĺui Ē~ °t, k…ô-sj…ô atu kasipu ¶aj a nar~…ĺimaan. . d…ômid…ômiad nu fan-ti-kan a nikaudip u misizaaj ku jadańß, katukuńßan tu pir~…ĺipajan, tinsukiw a sinza ida nami masaupu i s…ôn-puo-tu-r~…ĺu putańß, t…ôban nu ¶ajtu a kar~…ĺańßukan, kakat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu suni nu kiwkaj, ukiwsama itida i tuŇčduńß nu s…ôn-puo-tu-r~…ĺu kiwkaj t…ôban nu sasiŇčar~…ĺan a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, pasajda i sinza a mińßapu tu sasakamu…ôn, fan-ti-kan a zuj-s…ô-wi-duj tu mińßmińß ¶aan a r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad itida i s…ôn-ta-ma-suo putańß mipar~…ĺima, miasip tu r~…ĺima nu s…ô ¶i nu ¶aajan kasumad a sasakamu…ôn, miinur~…ĺi tu paudipaj tu udip mińß…ôd…ôk tu sakakapańß nu kawaan, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ukiwsama pab…ôr~…ĺi tu nika udipan tu sakaudip. . tad…ômaw atu kamu***** ir~…ĺabuaj nu tad…ômaw i fan-ti-kan a nijaduan makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺr~…ĺus…ôp a tad…ômaw, u suŇčńßu namin, pasu ukiwsama, suŇčńßu, siwni, atu kasiŇčaŇčanan a zuj-s…ô- ¶in-wi-duj. . ¶aaj ńß…ônaj mińßapu ku fan-ti-kan tu tadakamu, nika itida i r~…ĺuo-ma kiwkaj u tada tat…ôŇčaaj a sur~…ĺitan u r~…ĺatiŇču. itida i kanatar~…ĺ ńßan, ju r~…ĺipuiŇč atu kunmuiŇč u ji-ta-r~…ĺi namin ku kamu nu ńß…ôni. ju mamasakamu ku tad…ômaw, aadińßan tu ¶udad atu r~…ĺaziw, u ji-ta-r~…ĺi atu nu duma a sasakamu…ôn. u zuj-s…ô ¶in-wi-duj, u d…ô-ji ku kamu nu ńß…ôni. .
S.FORM: == Fan-ti-kan śĘĶŤíāŚ≤° == Lui'tś≠∑ŚŹ≤ "Fan-ti-kan" a cudad namaka La-tin-gu "Vaticinia" miedaw a kitidaan". yu sumamad nu si-yen sip se-ci, Luo-ma-hunti cue-se-tan-din itida i Luo-ma-cen nutipan amisa nu kadu u disi ni Ye-su ci Sen-puo-duo-lu kapatayan patideng tu cue-se-tan-din kakiningan a tabakiay nu kiwkay, katukuh i caylim atu caynem a secian, cue-se-tan-din sumadeng tunu aydaay a Sen-puo-duo-lu luma', mala tensu kiwkay nu kapilihayan a kitidaan, kun-yen piclimnem mihcaan, Fa-lan-ke' wan-kuo kuowan ci Pi-pin u Luo-ma cen atu liwliw sipabeli tu ukiwsama " i kiwkay sapangangan han ci " pi-pin-sen-se", sisa mapatiden tu cen-ciw-he-y a " ukiwsama a kanatal" ahebal ku nikatukuh i Yi-ta-li subal nu tebanay a niyaduan a kitidaan. " Vaticinia,śĄŹÁāļ" . caysiw a seci, mapalekal ku O-cuo a min-cu-cu-yi, Yi-ta-li a binacadan malecad ku balucu sisa alaw adidi' adidi' ku lala' nu Yi-ta-li, amisa nu subal a Sa-tin-ni-ya wankuo mala Yi-ta-li mililiday nu kapulungan, u nuhenitu ku patidengay tu Yi-ta-li wangkuo. 19šłĖÁīÄ, . mala sakakaay nu ukiwsama a Luo-ma-cen misuayaw tu sakakalah nu sakapulung, u sakatusa a hunti ci Fa-lan-si ci Na-puo-lun san-se mala " midiputay tu kiwkay a tademaw" a ngangan sapatahekal tu hitay mamidiput tu Luo-ma-cen. . caywalpicsep mahcaan mabakuhac ku nikalepacaw, ci Na-puo-lun papatalumaen nida ku Luo-ma a hitay i kanatal, sisa u hitay nu Yi-ta-li taneng micumud i Luo-ma, malutatengaay tu a malecacay ku balucu nu Yi-ta-li, u ukiwsama patayda hantu i Luo-ma-cen nutipan amisa a kalimucu' a Fan-ti-kan nu hungtian a lumaan, u daydaytu nu ukiwsama pangangasa u " mapululay a Fan-ti-kan", siada tu Yi-ta-ll, caay papilabu tu Yi-ta-li a kakulian nu kanatal. 1870 . mangalay mikaykic tu Yi-ta-li atu aenengan nu kiwkay a cen-ce a kawawan, u sakakaay nu Yi-ta-li ci Muo-suo-li-ni atu ukiwsama midiput tu sabaw cacay a se itida i caysiwtusiw mihcaan lu bulad caycay demiad masasulit tu kiyaku " la-te'-lan kakiyakuan", palutatengan ku Yi-ta-li tada u aenengan kuyda sa, kakitidaan itida i Fan-ti-kan macimacian, singangan sa u Fan-ti-kan macimacian a kanatal, u paysupitay a kanatal, u lala' nu kanatal a caay debungan, ina kiyaku malutatengaay tu makaykic ku kiwkay atu sihu nu Yi-ta-li nu hatidaay tu a nikasasuadaay. sakatusa a nikalepacawan henay, u Fan-ti-kan miduduc tu kiyaku " la-te'-lan kakiyakuan" a sikawaw, tawyaay a ukiwsama cu Pi-hu-se-e'-se'. aenengan nu kiwkay itini i kanatal tu sakay cabayan nu saka singanganan, u ukiwsama atu kumung nu sapisuayaw tu kanatal nu cuwacuwaay a Luo-ma-kun-ciw-huy sapihaputu sasapatuduan a tatengaay a nganganan. sakay kanatalan nu Luo-ma-kun-ciw-huy a " tatelungan", kiwkay idaw ku sapikuwanaw tu kanatal a lahecian, taneng miliduma a kanatal masasulit tu kanatalan a kiyakuan atu taneng milabu tu kanatal nu masakaputay. ukiwsama pabeli tu kawaw i kiwsama nu wi-yen-huy sikawaw mikuwan tu Fan-ti-kan a kawawan, hulic nu Fa-ti-kan sipakayda i nu kiwkayan a hulican atu Fa-ti-kan-cen-kuo-cen-pen nu hucuna a hulican, anu acaay tu kasiwantanan nu Tin-cu-caw hulic sa, aw u Luo-ma-se tu a hulic ku cukaymasen. . kiwkay taneng sipakayda i nuudip tu a kiliyan pasayda i duma a kanatalan patahekal tu way-ciw-se-cei "patinaku u kun-se, ta-se sa", taneng miala tu duma a kanatalan nu nipatahekalan a way-ciw-se-cei. nika tada adidi' tu kina kanatal, duma a kanatalan patayda i Fan-ti-kan a masasakamu kanca pataydaen namin Luo-ma-se nipatidengan tu kakitidaan u Ta-se-kun. mahiniay a nika silahecian sa, Yi-ta-li aenengan nu kiwkay itida namin i Yi-ta-li nu udip tu a kanatalan. . sakaudipÁ∂ďśŅü inai' ku kakulian atu kaliwmahan, inai' ku hida sananay nu katahekalan. u sakaylaculan tu sakaudip u miliwkuay, sapaduhepi i tigamiay a paya, pa'suyay tu luma', picidekan nu daysang a kakalisiwan nu gingku a wawa nu kalisiw, Fan-tin-kan gingkiu nika silaculan atu nipasinubu nu ukiwsama atu sinza nu kiwkay a nipakinkin. . Fan-ti-kan itida i Pei-mie, O-cuo katuuday a kanatal idaw ku lasubu yi nu amilika a kalisiw sapikabu, u zaysan katukuh i Yi-ta-li nu yadahay a sakaudip nu kakulian, picidekan u sapitaykuan atu zaysang, u lala' a cacay makaala tu sipnem wang a kubuan. Kim, sakay hekal nu nisupedan makaala tu cacay a lasubu nu yi a kalisiwan nu Amilika. nu ayawan itida i tusepseptu mihcaan, Fan-ti-kan u Yi-ta-li-li-la atu Fan-ti-kan-li-la u sakalecad nu kalisiwan. Yi-ta-li milab utu O yun sa, masasulit ku Fan-ti-kan atu O-mun, patahekal misangan tu kalibuwa nu Fan-ti-kan, sasasingaan atu sakalalisiwan nu cacukaymasan. Śú®2002ŚĻīšĽ•ŚČć, . caysiwpicsep mihcaan nu teban a demiadan, Fan-ti-kan kabalihenawan nu sakaudip tada misuayaw tu nika ngelu' nu tada misuayaw tu nika ngelu' nu gingkuan, picidekan patelac ku nipikabuan atu macunusa nu lipida nu mikuliay, sisa akazi; tu. caysiwsiwsip mihcaan mikisang satu ku gingku idaw ku liwan tu sipcay.lu wang a Amilika nu kalisiw, idaw ku lalaculan tu 1.7428 yi Amilika a kalisiw, sapatahekal 1.7387 yi Amilika a kalisiw, tusepcaysep mihcaan Fan-ti-kan na akazi sa kapahtu ku sakasilaculan, na laculan han tu yi sip malebut lim lasubu wang O-yen, sapatahekal tu yi lu malebut lim lasubu wang Oyen. 1970 . lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ Fan-ti-kan cen u lalangawan tu kiya kakitidaan, u sangan tu luma' patinaku u Sen-puo-tun-lu luma', Si-se-ten pilipayan a kiwkay u sakay kanatalan u sakaetiman nu sanga a luma'an, pasu Puo-tu-cie-li, Pei-e-ni-ni, La-pei-e atu Mi-kay-lan-ci-luo nu tademawan a sanga. Fan-ti-kan idaw ku sasingaan tu cudad a tu-su-kun, atu puo-u-kun, u sapisingaaw tu idaw nu lui't, ke-sye atu kasipucay a nalimaan. . demidemiad nu Fan-ti-kan a nikaudip u misizaay ku yadah, katukuhan tu pilipayan, tinsukiw a sinza ida nami masaupu i Sen-puo-tu-lu putah, teban nu caytu a kalahukan, kakatengil tu suni nu kiwkay, ukiwsama itida i tungduh nu Sen-puo-tu-lu kiwkay teban nu sasingalan a tahekal, pasayda i sinza a mihapu tu sasakamuen, Fan-ti-kan a Zuy-se-wi-duy tu mihmihcaan a lima a bulad enem a demiad itida i Sen-ta-ma-suo putah mipalima, miasip tu lima nu seci nu caayan kasumad a sasakamuen, miinuli tu paudipay tu udip mihedek tu sakakapah nu kawaan, mikilul tu ukiwsama pabeli tu nika udipan tu sakaudip. . tademaw atu kamušļļŚŹ£ŚíĆŤ™ěŤ®Ä ilabuay nu tademaw i Fan-ti-kan a niyaduan makaala tu wallusep a tademaw, u sunghu namin, pasu ukiwsama, sunghu, siwni, atu kasinganganan a zuy-se-cin-wi-duy. . caay henay mihapu ku Fan-ti-kan tu tadakamu, nika itida i Luo-ma kiwkay u tada tatengaay a sulitan u latingu. itida i kanatal han, yu lipuing atu kunmuing u Yi-ta-li namin ku kamu nu heni. yu mamasakamu ku tademaw, aadihan tu cudad atu laziw, u Yi-ta-li atu nu duma a sasakamuen. u Zuy-se cin-wi-duy, u De-yi ku kamu nu heni. .
S.PHON: == fan-ti-kan *** == r~…ĺui Ē~ °t** "fan-ti-kan" a ¶udad namaka r~…ĺa-tin-gu "*ati ¶inia" mi…ôdaw a kitidaan". ju sumamad nu si-j…ôn sip s…ô- ¶i, r~…ĺuo-ma-ńßunti ¶u…ô-s…ô-tan-din itida i r~…ĺuo-ma- ¶…ôn nutipan amisa nu kadu u disi ni j…ô-su ¶i s…ôn-puo-duo-r~…ĺu kapatajan patid…ôŇč tu ¶u…ô-s…ô-tan-din kakiniŇčan a tabakiaj nu kiwkaj, katukuńß i ¶ajr~…ĺim atu ¶ajn…ôm a s…ô ¶ian, ¶u…ô-s…ô-tan-din sumad…ôŇč tunu ajdaaj a s…ôn-puo-duo-r~…ĺu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa t…ônsu kiwkaj nu kapir~…ĺińßajan a kitidaan, kun-j…ôn pi ¶r~…ĺimn…ôm mińß ¶aan, fa-r~…ĺan-k…ô Ē~ ° wan-kuo kuowan ¶i pi-pin u r~…ĺuo-ma ¶…ôn atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw sipab…ôr~…ĺi tu ukiwsama " i kiwkaj sapaŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i " pi-pin-s…ôn-s…ô", sisa mapatid…ôn tu ¶…ôn- ¶iw-ńß…ô-j a " ukiwsama a kanatar~…ĺ" ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku nikatukuńß i ji-ta-r~…ĺi subar~…ĺ nu t…ôbanaj a nijaduan a kitidaan. " *ati ¶inia,**" . ¶ajsiw a s…ô ¶i, mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku o- ¶uo a min- ¶u- ¶u-ji, ji-ta-r~…ĺi a bina ¶adan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku bar~…ĺu ¶u sisa ar~…ĺaw adidi Ē~ ° adidi Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu ji-ta-r~…ĺi, amisa nu subar~…ĺ a sa-tin-ni-ja wankuo mar~…ĺa ji-ta-r~…ĺi mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan, u nuńß…ônitu ku patid…ôŇčaj tu ji-ta-r~…ĺi waŇčkuo. ****, . mar~…ĺa sakakaaj nu ukiwsama a r~…ĺuo-ma- ¶…ôn misuajaw tu sakakar~…ĺańß nu sakapur~…ĺuŇč, u sakatusa a ńßunti ¶i fa-r~…ĺan-si ¶i na-puo-r~…ĺun san-s…ô mar~…ĺa " midiputaj tu kiwkaj a tad…ômaw" a ŇčaŇčan sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ńßitaj mamidiput tu r~…ĺuo-ma- ¶…ôn. . ¶ajwar~…ĺpi ¶s…ôp mańß ¶aan mabakuńßa ¶ ku nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, ¶i na-puo-r~…ĺun papatar~…ĺuma…ôn nida ku r~…ĺuo-ma a ńßitaj i kanatar~…ĺ, sisa u ńßitaj nu ji-ta-r~…ĺi tan…ôŇč mi ¶umud i r~…ĺuo-ma, mar~…ĺutat…ôŇčaaj tu a mar~…ĺ…ô ¶a ¶aj ku bar~…ĺu ¶u nu ji-ta-r~…ĺi, u ukiwsama patajda ńßantu i r~…ĺuo-ma- ¶…ôn nutipan amisa a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° a fan-ti-kan nu ńßuŇčtian a r~…ĺumaan, u dajdajtu nu ukiwsama paŇčaŇčasa u " mapur~…ĺur~…ĺaj a fan-ti-kan", siada tu ji-ta-r~…ĺr~…ĺ, ¶aaj papir~…ĺabu tu ji-ta-r~…ĺi a kakur~…ĺian nu kanatar~…ĺ. **** . maŇčar~…ĺaj mikajki ¶ tu ji-ta-r~…ĺi atu a…ôn…ôŇčan nu kiwkaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a kawawan, u sakakaaj nu ji-ta-r~…ĺi ¶i muo-suo-r~…ĺi-ni atu ukiwsama midiput tu sabaw ¶a ¶aj a s…ô itida i ¶ajsiwtusiw mińß ¶aan r~…ĺu bur~…ĺad ¶aj ¶aj d…ômiad masasur~…ĺit tu kijaku " r~…ĺa-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺan kakijakuan", par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ku ji-ta-r~…ĺi tada u a…ôn…ôŇčan kujda sa, kakitidaan itida i fan-ti-kan ma ¶ima ¶ian, siŇčaŇčan sa u fan-ti-kan ma ¶ima ¶ian a kanatar~…ĺ, u pajsupitaj a kanatar~…ĺ, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu kanatar~…ĺ a ¶aaj d…ôbuŇčan, ina kijaku mar~…ĺutat…ôŇčaaj tu makajki ¶ ku kiwkaj atu sińßu nu ji-ta-r~…ĺi nu ńßatidaaj tu a nikasasuadaaj. sakatusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan ńß…ônaj, u fan-ti-kan midudu ¶ tu kijaku " r~…ĺa-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺan kakijakuan" a sikawaw, tawjaaj a ukiwsama ¶u pi-ńßu-s…ô-…ô Ē~ °-s…ô Ē~ °. a…ôn…ôŇčan nu kiwkaj itini i kanatar~…ĺ tu sakaj ¶abajan nu saka siŇčaŇčanan, u ukiwsama atu kumuŇč nu sapisuajaw tu kanatar~…ĺ nu ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a r~…ĺuo-ma-kun- ¶iw-ńßuj sapińßaputu sasapatuduan a tat…ôŇčaaj a ŇčaŇčanan. sakaj kanatar~…ĺan nu r~…ĺuo-ma-kun- ¶iw-ńßuj a " tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan", kiwkaj idaw ku sapikuwanaw tu kanatar~…ĺ a r~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian, tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺiduma a kanatar~…ĺ masasur~…ĺit tu kanatar~…ĺan a kijakuan atu tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺabu tu kanatar~…ĺ nu masakaputaj. ukiwsama pab…ôr~…ĺi tu kawaw i kiwsama nu wi-j…ôn-ńßuj sikawaw mikuwan tu fan-ti-kan a kawawan, ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu fa-ti-kan sipakajda i nu kiwkajan a ńßur~…ĺi ¶an atu fa-ti-kan- ¶…ôn-kuo- ¶…ôn-p…ôn nu ńßu ¶una a ńßur~…ĺi ¶an, anu a ¶aaj tu kasiwantanan nu tin- ¶u- ¶aw ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sa, aw u r~…ĺuo-ma-s…ô tu a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ ku ¶ukajmas…ôn. . kiwkaj tan…ôŇč sipakajda i nuudip tu a kir~…ĺijan pasajda i duma a kanatar~…ĺan patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu waj- ¶iw-s…ô- ¶…ôi "patinaku u kun-s…ô, ta-s…ô sa", tan…ôŇč miar~…ĺa tu duma a kanatar~…ĺan nu nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan a waj- ¶iw-s…ô- ¶…ôi. nika tada adidi Ē~ ° tu kina kanatar~…ĺ, duma a kanatar~…ĺan patajda i fan-ti-kan a masasakamu kan ¶a patajda…ôn namin r~…ĺuo-ma-s…ô nipatid…ôŇčan tu kakitidaan u ta-s…ô-kun. mańßiniaj a nika sir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian sa, ji-ta-r~…ĺi a…ôn…ôŇčan nu kiwkaj itida namin i ji-ta-r~…ĺi nu udip tu a kanatar~…ĺan. . sakaudip** inai Ē~ ° ku kakur~…ĺian atu kar~…ĺiwmańßan, inai Ē~ ° ku ńßida sananaj nu katańß…ôkar~…ĺan. u sakajr~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu sakaudip u mir~…ĺiwkuaj, sapaduńß…ôpi i tigamiaj a paja, pa Ē~ °sujaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, pi ¶id…ôkan nu dajsaŇč a kakar~…ĺisiwan nu giŇčku a wawa nu kar~…ĺisiw, fan-tin-kan giŇčkiu nika sir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu nipasinubu nu ukiwsama atu sinza nu kiwkaj a nipakinkin. . fan-ti-kan itida i p…ôi-mi…ô, o- ¶uo katuudaj a kanatar~…ĺ idaw ku r~…ĺasubu ji nu amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw sapikabu, u zajsan katukuńß i ji-ta-r~…ĺi nu jadańßaj a sakaudip nu kakur~…ĺian, pi ¶id…ôkan u sapitajkuan atu zajsaŇč, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a ¶a ¶aj makaar~…ĺa tu sipn…ôm waŇč a kubuan. kim, sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu nisup…ôdan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu nu ji a kar~…ĺisiwan nu amir~…ĺika. nu ajawan itida i tus…ôps…ôptu mińß ¶aan, fan-ti-kan u ji-ta-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺa atu fan-ti-kan-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺa u sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kar~…ĺisiwan. ji-ta-r~…ĺi mir~…ĺab utu o jun sa, masasur~…ĺit ku fan-ti-kan atu o-mun, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ misaŇčan tu kar~…ĺibuwa nu fan-ti-kan, sasasiŇčaan atu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺisiwan nu ¶a ¶ukajmasan. ********, . ¶ajsiwpi ¶s…ôp mińß ¶aan nu t…ôban a d…ômiadan, fan-ti-kan kabar~…ĺińß…ônawan nu sakaudip tada misuajaw tu nika Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° nu tada misuajaw tu nika Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° nu giŇčkuan, pi ¶id…ôkan pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku nipikabuan atu ma ¶unusa nu r~…ĺipida nu mikur~…ĺiaj, sisa akazi; tu. ¶ajsiwsiwsip mińß ¶aan mikisaŇč satu ku giŇčku idaw ku r~…ĺiwan tu sip ¶aj.r~…ĺu waŇč a amir~…ĺika nu kar~…ĺisiw, idaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu *.**** ji amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw, sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ *.**** ji amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw, tus…ôp ¶ajs…ôp mińß ¶aan fan-ti-kan na akazi sa kapańßtu ku sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, na r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ńßan tu ji sip mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺim r~…ĺasubu waŇč o-j…ôn, sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ji r~…ĺu mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺim r~…ĺasubu waŇč oj…ôn. **** . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ** fan-ti-kan ¶…ôn u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tu kija kakitidaan, u saŇčan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° patinaku u s…ôn-puo-tun-r~…ĺu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, si-s…ô-t…ôn pir~…ĺipajan a kiwkaj u sakaj kanatar~…ĺan u saka…ôtiman nu saŇča a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, pasu puo-tu- ¶i…ô-r~…ĺi, p…ôi-…ô-ni-ni, r~…ĺa-p…ôi-…ô atu mi-kaj-r~…ĺan- ¶i-r~…ĺuo nu tad…ômawan a saŇča. fan-ti-kan idaw ku sasiŇčaan tu ¶udad a tu-su-kun, atu puo-u-kun, u sapisiŇčaaw tu idaw nu r~…ĺui Ē~ °t, k…ô-sj…ô atu kasipu ¶aj a nar~…ĺimaan. . d…ômid…ômiad nu fan-ti-kan a nikaudip u misizaaj ku jadańß, katukuńßan tu pir~…ĺipajan, tinsukiw a sinza ida nami masaupu i s…ôn-puo-tu-r~…ĺu putańß, t…ôban nu ¶ajtu a kar~…ĺańßukan, kakat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu suni nu kiwkaj, ukiwsama itida i tuŇčduńß nu s…ôn-puo-tu-r~…ĺu kiwkaj t…ôban nu sasiŇčar~…ĺan a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, pasajda i sinza a mińßapu tu sasakamu…ôn, fan-ti-kan a zuj-s…ô-wi-duj tu mińßmińß ¶aan a r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad itida i s…ôn-ta-ma-suo putańß mipar~…ĺima, miasip tu r~…ĺima nu s…ô ¶i nu ¶aajan kasumad a sasakamu…ôn, miinur~…ĺi tu paudipaj tu udip mińß…ôd…ôk tu sakakapańß nu kawaan, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ukiwsama pab…ôr~…ĺi tu nika udipan tu sakaudip. . tad…ômaw atu kamu***** ir~…ĺabuaj nu tad…ômaw i fan-ti-kan a nijaduan makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺr~…ĺus…ôp a tad…ômaw, u suŇčńßu namin, pasu ukiwsama, suŇčńßu, siwni, atu kasiŇčaŇčanan a zuj-s…ô- ¶in-wi-duj. . ¶aaj ńß…ônaj mińßapu ku fan-ti-kan tu tadakamu, nika itida i r~…ĺuo-ma kiwkaj u tada tat…ôŇčaaj a sur~…ĺitan u r~…ĺatiŇču. itida i kanatar~…ĺ ńßan, ju r~…ĺipuiŇč atu kunmuiŇč u ji-ta-r~…ĺi namin ku kamu nu ńß…ôni. ju mamasakamu ku tad…ômaw, aadińßan tu ¶udad atu r~…ĺaziw, u ji-ta-r~…ĺi atu nu duma a sasakamu…ôn. u zuj-s…ô ¶in-wi-duj, u d…ô-ji ku kamu nu ńß…ôni. .
